title: AWARDS
heading2: Vetted by Korean Government. Only Web3 Selected.
paragraph1: Won & secured 10+ competitive grants from Korea's top programs. Government screening. Live pitches. Industry leaders.
paragraph2: We aren't speculative. We are building real IP + infrastructure.
paragraph3: Post-launch: Targeting bigger programs at full speed.
